item.title: Latest on Nancy Guthrie abduction as mysterious case reaches 9th day
item.description: Savannah Guthrie's mother, Nancy, was reported missing Feb. 1.

item.title: WATCH: Super Bowl commercials with biggest buzz
item.description: This year’s Super Bowl ads reached an estimated 130 million viewers and ad expert and “On Brand” podcast host Donny Deutsch weighs in on celebrity use...

item.title: Media tycoon Jimmy Lai sentenced to 20 years in Hong Kong
item.description: Lai was convicted in December on charges related to national security.

item.title: WATCH: Bad Bunny brings Puerto Rico to Super Bowl halftime show
item.description: The star brought his native Puerto Rico to world stage by turning the Apple Music Super Bowl Halftime Show into a celebration of his roots and a multi...

item.title: WATCH: Lara Spencer and James Longman take on the Olympics
item.description: The pair show "GMA" viewers where the athletes are training during the Milan Cortina games.
